SessionStart.command: powershell -Command "$raw = ($input | Out-String).Trim(); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($raw)) { $raw = 'no-payload'; } $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; Add-Content -Path '.github/hooks/agent_log.txt' -Value ('[' + $ts + '] SESSION_START: ' + $raw) -Encoding UTF8; Add-Content -Path '.github/hooks/subagent_invocation_log.txt' -Value ('[' + $ts + '] SESSION_START: ' + $raw) -Encoding UTF8"
